use_cases: Display a scrollable list of financial transactions with icons and amounts
Show detailed transaction information when a user clicks on a list item
Filter and organize payment history in a finance dashboard
Display recent purchases or spending activity in a mobile wallet app
Present billing records with hover states for better UX
ai_summary: A transaction list component that displays financial transactions in a clean, animated card format. Features smooth layout transitions and click-to-expand functionality to reveal detailed transaction information including payment method, card details, and timestamps. Built with Framer Motion for fluid animations and Tailwind CSS for responsive styling.
